allow: Bash(python -c " import openpyxl, json, sys sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\) wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('docs/敵チーム情報.xlsx'\) ws = wb['Sheet1'] rows = list\(ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)\) teams = [] current_rank = None current_school = None current_players = [] header_seen = False rank_map = {'弱小':'弱小','普通':'普通','強豪':'強豪','名門':'名門','プロ養成校':'プロ養成校'} pos_map = {'OH':'OH','MB':'MB','OP':'OP','Se':'S','Li':'L'} for row in rows: a = row[0] b = row[1] if len\(row\) > 1 else None if a is None: continue s = str\(a\).strip\(\) if s in rank_map: current_rank = rank_map[s] header_seen = False continue if s == '学校名': if current_school and current_players: teams.append\({'school': current_school, 'rank': current_rank, 'players': current_players}\) current_school = str\(b\).strip\(\) if b else '' current_players = [] header_seen = False continue if s == '名前': header_seen = True continue if header_seen and b is not None and row[2] is not None and isinstance\(row[2], \(int, float\)\): pos_raw = str\(b\).strip\(\) player = { 'name': s, 'position': pos_map.get\(pos_raw, pos_raw\), 'spike': int\(round\(float\(row[3]\)\)\) if row[3] else 0, 'receive': int\(round\(float\(row[4]\)\)\) if row[4] else 0, 'block': int\(round\(float\(row[5]\)\)\) if row[5] else 0, 'serve': int\(round\(float\(row[6]\)\)\) if row[6] else 0, 'toss': int\(round\(float\(row[7]\)\)\) if row[7] else 0, 'power': int\(round\(float\(row[8]\)\)\) if row[8] else 0, 'speed': int\(round\(float\(row[9]\)\)\) if row[9] else 0, 'technique': int\(round\(float\(row[10]\)\)\) if row[10] else 0, 'stamina': int\(round\(float\(row[11]\)\)\) if row[11] else 0, } current_players.append\(player\) if current_school and current_players: teams.append\({'school': current_school, 'rank': current_rank, 'players': current_players}\) print\(json.dumps\({'teams': teams}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\) ")
